content: TokenConsumptionChart (warren-4dc9) should follow the same data-passing pattern as all other charts on RunAnalytics.tsx: pass 'data?.tokens.xxx ?? []' directly rather than wrapping in '{data ? <Component data={data.tokens.xxx} /> : null}'. The null-conditional + fallback pattern renders the chart in its empty state during loading, consistent with RunsOverTimeChart, FailureReasonChart, etc. (warren-af75 polish).
